acceptanceCriteria: .rigor/rigor-ci.cjs is byte-identical to the committed dist/rigor.cjs.
Running node .rigor/rigor-ci.cjs ci --base <sha> --head <sha> executes the verifier and emits parseable JSON (no longer a silent no-op).
No source, policy, workflow, or other file is changed; only the CI bundle is refreshed.
The full suite (test:all, bench, plugin validate --strict, git diff --check) still passes.
note: Policy permits transmission; minimize content and re-check destination controls.
